products.name: Classic Chocolate Chunk
products.desc: 72% Valrhona dark chocolate folded into brown-butter dough. The one that started it all.
products.origin: Born in Lena's home kitchen, 2023. The recipe that started it all.
products.resultDesc: You're timeless, dependable, and everyone's first call. You don't need to be flashy — your quality speaks for itself. The original, and still the one people come back to.

products.name: Double Dark Chocolate
products.desc: Dutch cocoa base loaded with bittersweet chunks. Dusted with Maldon salt.
products.origin: Created for a chocolate-obsessed regular who said 'make it darker.' We did.
products.resultDesc: You go all in. Moderation isn't in your vocabulary and honestly? It's working. You're intense in the best way, and people either keep up or get out of the way.

products.name: Brown Butter Toffee
products.desc: Nutty brown butter meets house-made almond toffee. Sweet, salty, crunch, chew.
products.origin: Inspired by a trip to an English sweets shop. The crunch took 12 tries to perfect.
products.resultDesc: You've got layers. People think they've figured you out, then you surprise them. Complex, a little unexpected, and somehow everything comes together perfectly.

products.name: Raspberry Dark
products.desc: Tart freeze-dried raspberries woven through dark chocolate dough. Pink-flecked and punchy.
products.origin: A happy accident — Marcus dropped freeze-dried raspberries into dark chocolate dough.
products.resultDesc: You're the creative one. You see combinations others miss and you're not afraid to try something different. Colorful, bold, and impossible to forget.

products.name: Sea Salt Caramel
products.desc: Gooey caramel core wrapped in vanilla bean dough. Finished with flaky sea salt.
products.origin: Lena's grandmother's caramel recipe, adapted for cookies. The salt is French.
products.resultDesc: You've mastered the balance everyone else is still chasing. Warm, sophisticated, with just enough edge to keep things interesting. The sweet-and-salty of the group.

products.name: Matcha White Chocolate
products.desc: Ceremonial-grade matcha and creamy white chocolate. Earthy, sweet, and vibrant green.
products.origin: A collaboration with a tea master from Uji, Japan. The matcha is ceremonial grade.
products.resultDesc: You're refined, a little unexpected, and you definitely know something the rest of us don't. People who get you REALLY get you. An acquired taste worth acquiring.

products.name: Chai Spice
products.desc: Masala chai spices — cardamom, cinnamon, ginger, clove — steeped in brown butter. Like a warm mug in cookie form.
ingredients: Chai spice blend (cardamom, cinnamon, ginger, clove, black pepper)
products.origin: Priya's rainy-day experiment. The kitchen smelled like a Mumbai chai stall for a week.
products.resultDesc: You're curious, adventurous, and always chasing a new flavor — even if it's just through a cookbook. You bring warmth everywhere you go, and people feel at home around you.

products.name: Maple Pecan
products.desc: Vermont maple syrup and toasted Georgia pecans in a brown-sugar dough. Breakfast-adjacent, dessert-approved.
products.origin: Lena spent a weekend in Vermont and came back with a gallon of syrup and a mission.
products.resultDesc: You believe mornings are for savoring, not rushing. You're steady, genuine, and quietly luxurious — the one who reminds everyone to slow down and enjoy the moment.

products.name: Summer Berry
products.desc: Freeze-dried strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries folded into white chocolate dough. July in a cookie.
products.origin: A tribute to Oregon berry season. Marcus forages the berries himself when he can.
products.resultDesc: You're the life of the picnic — bright, playful, and a little bit unexpected. You don't wait for summer; you bring it with you. Colorful, joyful, and impossible to ignore.

options.text: Curled up with a book and a blanket
Trying a new restaurant across town

questions.q: Pick a drink to go with it.

options.text: Oat milk latte with a dash of cinnamon

questions.q: What do your friends say about you?

options.text: "The reliable one — you always show up"
"You're a little extra. In the best way."
"I never know what you're going to do next"
